title: cicer pungens
intro: Cicer pungens, also known as the bitter vetch or hoary vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cicer pungens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
